'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) {{DEFAULTSORT:うはいほうめいしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:東京都の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) {{DEFAULTSORT:うはいほうめいしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:東京都の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) {{DEFAULTSORT:うはいほうめいしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:東京都の旧郷社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:東京都の旧郷社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都の旧郷社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:八丈町の建築物]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:Buildings in Hachijo]] [[Category:八丈町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:Buildings in Hachijo]] [[Category:History of Hachijo]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:優婆夷宝明神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926154}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ubaihōmei Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Tokyo Islands}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} Ōkagō 660-1 |位置 = {{Coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ubai Ōkami, Hōmei-no-Kami |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 13 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ubai
Hōmei Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|5|59|N|139|46|51|E}}}} }} '''Ubaihōmei Shrine''' (うばいほうめいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hachijō|Q1354815|WD=Q1354815|1=Hachijō, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Hachijō-jima|Q1191120|WD=Q1191120|1=Hachijō-jima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is the general tutelary shrine of Hachijō-jima and {{ill|lt=Aogashima|Q615578|WD=Q615578|1=Aogashima}}. It was formed by merging the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ubainomikoto Shrine''' (うばいのみことじんじゃ) and '''Koshikinomikoto Shrine''' (こしきのみことじんじゃ). Its current name combines the names of the deities of those two shrines, described below[https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website[http://www.yafune.server-shared.com/you-xu/ 由緒] - Yafune Shrine. === Enshrined deities === * Ubai Ōkami (うばいのおおかみ) - one of the eight consorts, Yasoyaehime, of {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin)[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines[http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition); i.e., Ubainomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Ubainomikoto Shrine. * Hōmei-no-Kami (ほうめいのかみ) - her child Kohōmaru; i.e., Koshikinomikoto, deity of the Shikinaisha Koshikinomikoto Shrine. === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Matsuo Shrine|Q11529677|WD=Q11529677|1=Matsuo shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}}) * {{ill|lt=Inari Shrine|Q514480|WD=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama Ōkami|1=Ukanomitama}}) * Iso Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}}) * {{ill|lt=Mishima Shrine|Q11355275|WD=Q11355275|1=Mishima Shrine (Taito)}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamazumi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}) * {{ill|lt=Togakushi Shrine|Q218828|WD=Q218828|1=Togakushi Shrine}} (deity unknown) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://ubai-houmei.tokyo/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - official website * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/3142/ 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines ** [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/hachijyoujima.html 優婆夷宝明神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines (Island Special Edition) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ubaihoumei Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:Buildings in Hachijo]] [[Category:History of Hachijo]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]]
